title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at PhonePe South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at PhonePe South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at PhonePe South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
